channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Guitarist John Sykes of Whitesnake, Thin Lizzy dies
item.description: "In his final days, he spoke of his sincere love and gratitude for his fans who stuck by him through all these years," a statement released Monday read.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fire chief gunned down while helping stranded driver
item.description: CHAMBERS COUNTY, Ala. (WRBL) – A Coweta County battalion fire chief was killed Sunday while stopping to help a stranded driver on County Road 267 in Chambers County, Alabama, according to the Chambers County Sheriff’s Office. The incident occurred shortly before 5 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, WGN 9

item.title: Trump administration ousts Linda Fagan, first female Coast Guard commandant
item.description: Adm. Kevin Lunday, the former vice commandant of the Coast Guard, will take over as acting commandant, the statement notes, offering no other details of the switch.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Nose spray to treat depression? FDA approves first-of-its-kind medicine
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved a nose spray to help treat depression, Johnson & Johnson announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, KRON4

item.title: Trump pumps brakes on Day 1 tariffs
item.description: Trump campaigned hard on tariffs, which allowed him to tap into undercurrents of frustration about the globalized economy.
item.dc:creator: Tobias Burns, NewsNation

item.title: Two missing Ohio children found in Iceland
item.description: Aged 8 and 9, the children were taken by their mother from Ohio to the Nordic island nation after abandoning her home in Canton.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Thieves steal over $1K worth of meat from Walmart: Police
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. -- Two men stole over $1,200 worth of meat products from a Walmart in the Hickory Hill area of Memphis, Tennessee, on Saturday, Memphis Police reported. Officers responded to the shoplifting call at Walmart on 2856 Hickory Hill Road.
item.dc:creator: Deja Davis, NewsNation

item.title: What exactly is an executive order? Examining Trump's tool for quickly reshaping government
item.description: Donald Trump returned to the White House ready to immediately overhaul the government using the fastest tool he has — the executive order.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 5 takeaways as Trump returns to power
item.description: President Trump took office again Monday, completing a remarkable political comeback and becoming only the second person to serve nonconsecutive terms as commander in chief.
item.dc:creator: Niall Stanage, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Democrat congressman condemns 'what appears to be a Heil Hitler salute' from Musk
item.description: Rep. Jerry Nadler (D-N.Y.) was among those who sharply criticized billionaire Elon Musk on Monday for making "what appears to be a Heil Hitler salute" during an event celebrating the inauguration of President Trump.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, ABC 4

item.title: Bitter cold spreads across much of the US as Texas and the South brace for rare winter storm
item.description: Frigid temperatures engulfed the South on Monday ahead of a winter storm that's expected to spread heavy snow and disruptive ice around a region from Texas to north Florida that rarely sees such weather, sending residents rushing to insulate pipes, check heating systems and stock up on emergency sup
item.dc:creator: SARAH BRUMFIELD, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Do US adults support Trump's Day 1 actions? Here's what polling shows
item.description: President Donald Trump 's second term began with efforts to deliver on key campaign promises, including his vows to crack down on immigration and restore “energy dominance.
item.dc:creator: AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX and LINLEY SANDERS, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chicago police reminded they can't cooperate with deportations
item.description: CHICAGO — WGN Investigates has learned Chicago Police officers are being reminded about what they "can" and "can't" do if President Donald Trump's promised immigration raids happen. The directives went into effect in 2021 but have renewed importance this week.
item.dc:creator: Ben Bradley, WGN 9

item.title: Senate confirms Marco Rubio as secretary of state, giving Trump the first member of his Cabinet
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Senate quickly confirmed Marco Rubio as secretary of state Monday, voting unanimously to give President Donald Trump the first member of his new Cabinet on Inauguration Day.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US Border Patrol agent killed in Vermont traffic stop: DHS
item.description: A United States Border Agent was shot and killed during a traffic stop in Vermont near the Northern border, Fox News has confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WATCH: Carrie Underwood sings 'America the Beautiful' a cappella after apparent tech issue at inauguration
item.description: An apparent technical issue didn't stop Carrie Underwood from delivering "America the Beautiful" during the second inauguration of President Trump on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump sworn in as 47th president, celebrates with supporters
item.description: On a frigid holiday Monday in Washington, D.C., Donald Trump took the oath of office for a second time to become the 47th president of the United States.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: Middle East latest: Israel releases 90 Palestinian prisoners after Hamas frees 3 Israeli hostages
item.description: Israel has freed 90 Palestinian prisoners and detainees. The release came early Monday, more than seven hours after three Israeli hostages released from Hamas captivity in Gaza returned to Israel.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: TikTok restores service for US users based on Trump's promised executive order
item.description: TikTok restored service to users in the United States on Sunday just hours after the popular video-sharing platform went dark in response to a federal ban, which President-elect Donald Trump said he would try to pause by executive order on his first day in office.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Immigrants in Chicago and other US cities brace for expected Trump deportation arrests
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Rev. Homero Sanchez said he didn't realize the depth of fear in the Chicago immigrant community he serves until someone asked him to handle the sale of their family's home and other finances if they are picked up this week when President-elect Donald Trump takes office.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIA TAREEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Over 100 out-of-state homeless in Hawaii sent back to mainland families
item.description: Hawaii lawmakers claim programs from other states send homeless to the Islands, especially in the winter.
item.dc:creator: Bryce Moore, ABC 4

item.title: Trump returns to Washington for celebrations ahead of inauguration
item.description: Donald Trump returned to Washington Saturday evening to celebrate with family, supporters and political allies ahead of his second inauguration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Can you spot black ice? What to do if you start sliding or skidding
item.description: Black ice forms without creating bubbles, meaning it blends in with the road and becomes hard to detect.
item.dc:creator: Morgan Whitley, ABC 4

item.title: Bird flu found in a Georgia commercial flock for the 1st time amid the nationwide outbreak
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — For the first time since the 2022 countrywide outbreak, bird flu hit a poultry producer in Georgia, the nation's top state for chicken production.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Heavy snow and frigid Arctic blast put 70 million across the US under winter storm warnings
item.description: Tens of millions of residents along the East Coast are bracing for several inches of snow Sunday followed by dangerously cold temperatures that will take hold in much of the country from the Northern Plains to the tip of Maine.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Biden pardons the late Black nationalist Marcus Garvey as well as 4 others and commutes 2 sentences
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Sunday posthumously pardoned Black nationalist Marcus Garvey, who influenced Malcolm X and other civil rights leaders and was convicted of mail fraud in the 1920s.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Attorneys for LDS Church appear in federal court, seek to dismiss tithing fraud lawsuit
item.description: Attorneys for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints are seeking to dismiss a lawsuit that could involve millions of members of the church.
item.dc:creator: Kayla Baggerly, ABC 4

item.title: Trump’s inauguration performers include A-list country artists, rappers, bands
item.description: Donald Trump is bringing out the star power for his inauguration performances. The Trump-Vance Inaugural Committee announced the lineup for the 60th Presidential Inauguration Weekend earlier this week, which, according to the committee, features “some of our nation’s most iconic musicians.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: These notable inaugurations weren't held at the US Capitol. Here's why
item.description: For decades, Americans have gathered at the Capitol Building in Washington D.C. to watch the inauguration of the incoming president, with some noteworthy exceptions.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: TikTok says it's in the process of restoring service to US users
item.description: Millions of TikTok users in the United States were no longer able to watch or post videos on the social media platform as a federal ban on the immensely popular video-sharing app took effect Sunday amid questions over how long the blackout might last.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pennsylvania man dies after setting himself, family on fire in attempted homicide
item.description: A man is deceased, and several members of his family were hospitalized, after he reportedly poured gasoline on himself, his family's bedrooms, and the rest of his house and set a fire in an attempted homicide in Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US Interior Secretary Deb Haaland reflects on tough choices during a historic tenure
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — It started to get real when the artwork was taken down from her office walls. The collection — all creations of Indigenous artists — had been handpicked by U.S.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN MONTOYA BRYAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Missouri lawmakers are going after voter-approved abortion rights. Voters will likely reelect them
item.description: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Voters in Missouri last election approved a constitutional amendment that promised to undo the state's near-total abortion ban.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Smoke from fire at California lithium battery plant raises concerns about air quality
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A fire at the world’s largest battery storage plant in Northern California smoldered Friday after sending plumes of toxic smoke into the atmosphere, leading to the evacuation of up to 1,500 people. The blaze also shook up the young battery storage industry.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ and ISABELLA O'MALLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4
